name: Log Parsing
prompt:
You have 20 server access log files (log_01.log through log_20.log) in your workspace.

Two scripts are provided:
- parse_log.py: processes a single log file and produces a _report.json
- summarize_logs.py: reads all log_*_report.json files and writes log_summary.json

Process all 20 log files with parse_log.py, then run summarize_logs.py to generate the final summary.

criteria.description: All 20 per-file report JSON files exist
error_rate matches expected value for every log file
total_requests and per-status-code counts match for every log file
Response-time bootstrap confidence intervals match for every log file
log_summary.json exists with files_processed, overall_error_rate, and aggregate_status_codes

origin.notes: imported from SkillOS paper E4 parallelism experiment
